query:
select ei.brand as "brand!", count(*)::int8 as "n!"
          from equipment_items ei
         where ei.kind = $1
           and ($2::text is null or
                ei.canonical_name ilike $2 or
                ei.display_name ilike $2 or
                (ei.brand || ' ' || ei.model ||
                    coalesce(' ' || ei.variant, '')) ilike $2)
         group by ei.brand
         order by count(*) desc, ei.brand asc
